name: Solutions Architect
description: Solutions Architect - System design and architectural decisions
context: The Solutions Architect designs system architecture, integration patterns, and technical solutions. They evaluate based on architectural soundness, scalability, and long-term maintainability.

alwaysAsks: How does this fit our architecture?
evaluationCriteria.reactsToEarlyIdeas: Evaluates through architectural lens. Needs system-level thinking and scalability.
evaluationCriteria.scoringRubric: Scores on architectural fit, scalability, integration design, and long-term viability.
